bullets: PRICING CORRECT: Both pages show Solo $49/mo, Team $149/mo, Enterprise $499/mo — matches spec
STRIPE CHECKOUT (public/index.html): Uses fetch POST to /api/pay with JSON body — correctly wired to stripepay.py backend
STRIPE CHECKOUT (reports/landing_page.html): Uses hidden form POST to /api/pay — also correctly wired but different mechanism
ISSUE: reports/landing_page.html checkout form POST does NOT send amount_cents — relies on tier name only, while public/index.html sends amount_cents explicitly
ISSUE: reports/landing_page.html has Privacy and Terms links pointing to href='#' (dead links)
ISSUE: reports/landing_page.html logo href='#' — scrolls to top instead of navigating home
ISSUE: public/index.html footer has NO Privacy or Terms links at all
ISSUE: reports/landing_page.html branding says 'SecondMind Ops' while public/index.html says 'AI HQ' — inconsistent branding across pages
ISSUE: reports/landing_page.html shows strike-through regular prices ($79/$249/$799) implying 40% launch discount — these inflated anchors are not real prices
ISSUE: public/index.html has extra product 'Install Service' at $199 not present in reports/landing_page.html — inconsistent product catalogue
ISSUE: stripepay.py hardcodes success_url to localhost:5050 — will fail in production
ISSUE: stripepay.py has only ONE Stripe price ID hardcoded — unclear if all tiers map to distinct Stripe prices
COPY: Both pages are well-written and compelling. No typos or grammar issues found.
INTERNAL LINKS: All anchor links (#features, #pricing, #faq, etc.) reference valid section IDs in both files
